title: Luck SMP S3
description: a plugin which adds custom luck books with abilities that depend on luck
body:
[![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/75374b310675e4eb0fafc368819ebb1fc50df069.png)](https://foliumhosting.net/?utm_source=aff_doomwen)
### **Luck SMP S3**
### **Commands:**
  1. /books | open a GUI with all the luck books (Admin)
  2. /luck | open a GUI with the luck book you currently have
  3. /withdraw | Let's you withdraw your current book
  4. /luckbook <amount> | Gives you a reroller (Admin)
  5. /setluckbook <player> <book> | Let's you set the player's book to that book (Admin)
  6. /luckstart | Let's you start the SMP, Once you do this command all the players will get a random luck book and all new players that join in the future will also get it on join (Admin)
  7. /cooldown | resets your cooldown (Admin)

When you first join you get a random luck book
killing a player gives you a reroller
dying makes you lose your luck book
